series_metadata.series_description: All paper and electronic records related to payroll processing, including payroll register, emails documenting corrections and adjustments and related documents. Data collected from an electronic timekeeping system to establish payable work hours and attendance, e.g. time sheets.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is release and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is release and all discrepancies are resolved
